title: Tross Entity Metadata
description: Frontend mirror of backend entity metadata. Auto-generated by sync-entity-metadata.js

requester.description: User who created this approval request

unit.description: Unit where this asset is located

property.description: Property where this asset is located (via unit)

workOrders.description: Work orders submitted by this customer

units.description: Units owned or occupied by this customer

propertyRoles.description: Board/management roles this customer holds at properties

userAccount.description: User account linked to this customer profile (if any)

customer.description: Customer who owns or occupies the unit

unit.description: Unit owned or occupied by the customer

workOrder.description: Work order this invoice is for

serviceTemplate.description: Service template to use for generated work orders

units.description: Units within this property (apartments, common areas, etc.)

propertyRoles.description: Board members and managers assigned to this property

serviceAgreement.description: Service agreement this item belongs to

serviceTemplate.description: Service template included in this agreement

assignedWorkOrders.description: Work orders assigned to this technician

userAccount.description: User account linked to this technician profile (if any)

property.description: Property where this unit is located

customers.description: Customers who own or occupy this unit

workOrder.description: Parent work order for this visit

visit.description: Visit this subcontractor is assigned to
Visit this technician is assigned to

customer.description: Customer who requested this work order

unit.description: Unit where the work is to be performed

property.description: Property where the work is to be performed (often derived from unit)

assignedTechnician.description: Technician assigned to this work order

invoices.description: Invoices generated from this work order
